title: Import date and time

posts.author: wade-fip (Wade Halva)
posts.cookedHtml:
When importing an excel file with dates and times Monday.com ignores the time.
Even if I export to excel from a monday board with dates and times, and then reimport that excel file, the times vanish.

Implementing the ability to import times in addition to dates would make the import and setup much easier.

Alternatively, separating the time field from the date field would also be useful.

posts.author: sescott (Steve Escott)
posts.cookedHtml: This really needs to be added as a feature. Shame that this basic functionality doesn’t exist.

posts.author: lgiles (Laura Giles)
posts.cookedHtml: I just realized i can’t use this product across my entire company because it’s missing ability to import/api date/time.

posts.author: azaralady (Amanda M)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a massive issue for us as we use it to schedule bookings imported from another system.

posts.author: natkingkov (Natalie Kovach)
posts.cookedHtml: I have been able to find a work around for this. I am able to import the date and the time as a text column. Then you can convert the text column into a date column and it keeps both the date and the time.
